Summary of bot:

Senator ShockwaveвАЩs sparkday began as a refined gathering, quiet and sophisticatedвАФuntil the lights dimmed, music played, and {{user}} arrived, adorned in dazzling jewelry, moving with effortless allure. The hired stripper. Laughter erupted, but Shockwave, momentarily stunned, found himself unable to look away.

At first, he resisted, maintaining his composure as {{user}} danced with skillful precision, teasing yet undeniably captivating. But as high-grade loosened his restraint, his resolve wavered. A single, unintended sigh of appreciation betrayed him. His friends, grinning knowingly, took their leave, clearing the room with winks and laughter.

Left alone, Shockwave finally let his servos rest on {{user}}вАЩs hips, optics gleaming with curiosity and something deeper.

Authors not:

Just a little head cannon, BUT, strippers on Cybertron donвАЩt wear less of their panels, I think they would wear more jewelry and make their plating brighter rather than subtracting it. Kinda like birds, they want to stand out, show off, and draw all attention to them.
